summary: Iteration 44 - Canvas-based Particle Engine Celebration Testing COMPLETE. All 4 celebration types (SIX, FOUR, WICKET, PRIZE) working perfectly with the new Canvas particle engine. Verified: Canvas particles render correctly, all text/subtitles display properly, screen shake effect for WICKET, auto-dismiss functionality, no JS errors, no residual DOM elements. This is a MAJOR UPGRADE from iteration 43's Framer Motion-only implementation.
critical_code_review_comments: CelebrationOverlay.jsx: Complete Canvas-based particle engine (ParticleEngine class) with physics (gravity, friction, wind, wobble) - WORKING
Particle class supports multiple shapes: circle, ember, stump, confetti, spark, firework - ALL RENDERING
SIX celebration: 200+ fire embers (120 + 80 + 60 in waves), golden explosion, 'MAXIMUM!' text, 'OUT OF THE PARK' subtitle - VERIFIED
FOUR celebration: Blue boundary streaks (BoundaryStreaks component), wave particles, 'BOUNDARY!' text, 'RACING AWAY' subtitle - VERIFIED
WICKET celebration: Flying stumps (12 stump particles), red dust debris (100 particles), screen shake (shakeIntensity=18), dark vignette, 'WICKET!' slam text, 'TIMBER!' subtitle - VERIFIED
PRIZE celebration: 300 confetti rain (150 + 100 in waves), firework bursts (3 at different positions), gold sparkles, '1st' badge, 'CHAMPION!' text, 'VICTORY ROYALE' subtitle - VERIFIED
useScreenShake hook properly implements requestAnimationFrame cleanup - NO MEMORY LEAKS
All celebrations auto-dismiss via setTimeout chain (flash -> main -> fadeout -> dismiss) - WORKING
Demo trigger buttons (data-testid: demo-six, demo-four, demo-wicket, demo-prize) visible on Match Detail page line ~313-341 - VERIFIED
HomePage.jsx: Match cards wrapped in motion.div with staggered entrance animations (delay: i * 0.06-0.08) - VERIFIED
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 44 verified the MAJOR UPGRADE to Canvas-based particle engine. Key verified features: 1) Login flow works (Get Started -> Phone -> PIN -> Admin Dashboard -> Player View). 2) Homepage loads with 10 match cards with staggered entrance animations. 3) Match Detail page shows demo celebration buttons (SIX, FOUR, WICKET, WINNER). 4) All 4 celebration types trigger correctly with Canvas particles rendering. 5) SIX: 200+ fire embers with golden explosion. 6) FOUR: Blue boundary streaks with wave particles. 7) WICKET: Flying stumps, red dust, screen shake (intensity=18), dark vignette. 8) PRIZE: 300 confetti rain, 3 firework bursts, gold sparkles. 9) All celebrations auto-dismiss after duration (3.5s-4s). 10) No JS errors during any celebration. 11) No residual DOM elements after celebrations.
